title: Spec 001 — Project Bootstrap
description: Scaffold the project foundation: Vite + React + TypeScript, tooling, type definitions, and directory structure with placeholder files. Exit criteria: tsc, eslint, and vitest all pass clean. Spec: specs/001-project-bootstrap/spec.md

title: T001: Initialize Project
description: Initialize Vite + React + TypeScript project. Deliverables: package.json (React 18, TS, Vite, Vitest, RTL, ESLint), tsconfig.json (strict, noImplicitAny), vite.config.ts, vitest config, ESLint config, .gitignore, src/main.tsx, src/App.tsx, src/App.css, src/index.css. All tools must pass clean. File: project root

title: T002: Define Type System
description: Define all TypeScript interfaces, types, and enums in src/types/game.ts. Includes: GamePhase, WeaponType, AIDifficulty, TerrainSize enums. Position, Velocity, TerrainConfig, TerrainData, TankState, Shot, WeaponConfig, ExplosionColor, ProjectileState, ExplosionState, Particle, Wind, GameState, StoredPlayerProfile, PlayerStats, WeaponInventory, DifficultyConfig interfaces. TERRAIN_CONFIGS and DIFFICULTY_CONFIGS records. All types exported, tsc compiles clean.

title: T003: Create Directory Structure
description: Create all files from Master Plan directory structure with placeholder content. Engine files (src/engine/*.ts): physics, terrain, ai, weapons, projectile, explosion, tank, wind. Test files (src/engine/*.test.ts) with placeholder describes. Context files (src/context/*.tsx): GameContext, UserContext stubs. Component files (src/components/*.tsx): Canvas, ControlPanel, WeaponSelectionPanel, PlayerNameEntry, GameConfigScreen, WeaponShop, GameOverScreen, TurnIndicator, WindIndicator stubs. Services (src/services/storage.ts), Hooks (src/hooks/useKeyboard.ts), Styles (src/styles/theme.ts). All must compile and lint clean.

title: Spec 002 — Core Engine
description: Implement all pure engine modules with comprehensive test coverage. Every module in src/engine/, zero React imports, pure functions. Covers terrain, physics, wind, weapons, tanks, projectiles, explosions, damage, crater carving, and AI. >80% coverage. Depends on Spec 001. Spec: specs/002-core-engine/spec.md

title: Phase 1 — Independent Engine Modules
description: Four parallel tracks: (A) Terrain + Tank Placement, (B) Physics + Wind, (C) Projectile + Explosion, (D) Weapons + AI. All tracks run simultaneously with no cross-dependencies.

title: T001[A]: Terrain Generation & Crater Carving
description: src/engine/terrain.ts + terrain.test.ts. Implement: generateTerrain(size, seed?) via midpoint displacement with seeded RNG returning TerrainData. getTerrainHeight(terrain, x) with linear interpolation. carveCrater(terrain, impactX, impactY, blastRadius) with circular profile. Terrain sizes: Small(800x600), Medium(1024x768), Large(1280x960), Huge(1600x1200), Epic(2100x2800). Tests: valid heights, interpolation, all 5 sizes, crater depth, clamping, overlapping craters, edge craters. [P] parallel with T002-T004.

title: T002[B]: Physics Engine
description: src/engine/physics.ts + physics.test.ts. Implement: calculateVelocity(power, angle, speedMultiplier) with POWER_SCALE≈1.12. updateProjectilePosition(pos, vel, wind, dt) with gravity 10px/s² and wind accel wind*0.15px/s². worldToScreen/screenToWorld coordinate conversion. uiAngleToPhysics conversion. Tests: trajectory symmetry, known outcomes, calibration (100% power 70° ≈ terrain width), round-trip conversion, gravity/wind effects, edge cases (0% power, straight up). [P] parallel with T001,T003,T004.

title: T003[C]: Projectile System
description: src/engine/projectile.ts + projectile.test.ts. Implement: createProjectile(tank, angle, power, weaponType) at barrel tip with calculated velocity. updateProjectile(proj, wind, dt) using physics. checkTerrainCollision(proj, terrain). checkTankCollision(proj, tanks, blastRadius). isOutOfBounds(proj, terrain). Tests: barrel-tip position, terrain collision detection, tank collision within/outside blast radius, OOB detection, trail accumulation. [P] parallel with T001,T002,T004.

title: T004[D]: Weapon Configs & Damage Calculation
description: src/engine/weapons.ts + weapons.test.ts. Implement: WEAPON_CONFIGS Record<WeaponType, WeaponConfig> (Standard: 35%dmg/20px blast/free, Sniper: 100%dmg/12px/200cr, Heavy: 65%dmg/35px/250cr). calculateDamage(impactPos, tanks, weapon). ECONOMY constants (startingBalance 500, killReward 200, winBonus 250, lossConsolation 50). DIFFICULTY_MULTIPLIERS. calculateEarnings(kills, won, difficulty). Tests: all weapon stats, blast radius damage, dead tank immunity, economy math, difficulty multipliers. [P] parallel with T001-T003.

title: Phase 2 — Cross-Dependency Modules
description: Modules that depend on Phase 1: Tank placement (depends terrain), Wind system (depends physics), Explosion system (depends weapons), AI system (depends physics+terrain).

title: T005[A]: Tank Placement & Names
description: src/engine/tank.ts + tank.test.ts. Depends on T001 (terrain). Implement: placeTanks(terrain, playerName, playerColor, enemyCount) at evenly spaced positions, Y=terrain height. AI_NAME_POOL (20+ military names). TANK_COLORS (8+ hex values). settleTank(tank, terrain) for post-crater updates. Tests: correct count, even spacing, Y matches terrain, no duplicate colors, player color not reused, unique AI names, settleTank updates Y.

title: T006[B]: Wind System
description: src/engine/wind.ts + wind.test.ts. Depends on T002 (physics). Implement: generateInitialWind() with normalRandom(mean=0, stdDev=10) clamped ±30. updateWind(current) with mean-reversion (0.7 decay + normalRandom stdDev=5). normalRandom(mean, stdDev) via Box-Muller. Tests: bounds (1000 iterations), mean-reversion over sequential updates, normal distribution stats (10000 samples).

title: T007[C]: Explosion System
description: src/engine/explosion.ts + explosion.test.ts. Depends on T004 (weapon configs). Implement: createExplosion(position, weaponType) with state machine, particles. updateExplosion(explosion, dt) through growing→peak→fading→done phases (~1-2s total). createDestructionEffect(tank) for debris particles (~2s). isExplosionComplete(). Tests: phase transitions, timing, particle count (10-50), weapon-specific colors, destruction effect duration.

title: T008[D]: AI System (Basic)
description: src/engine/ai.ts + ai.test.ts. Depends on T002 (physics), T001 (terrain). Implement: calculateIdealShot(shooter, target, wind, terrain) using iterative binary search accounting for gravity/wind/distance/height. calculateAIShot(shooter, target, wind, terrain, difficulty) adding variance from difficulty table. selectTarget(shooter, tanks, lastTargetId) with persistence preference. Tests: ideal shot hits within 5px, wind compensation, difficulty variance ordering, clamping, target persistence, no self-targeting.

title: Spec 003 — Minimal Playable Battle
description: Bring the engine to screen and make the game playable. Player can fire at AI tanks on procedurally-generated destructible terrain, watch projectiles fly and explode, see craters form, and win or lose. Critical milestone — a basic Scorched Earth game. Depends on Spec 002. Spec: specs/003-minimal-playable-battle/spec.md

title: Phase 1 — Foundation (parallel)
description: Four parallel tracks with no cross-dependencies: Game Context, Keyboard Hook, Canvas Foundation, Tank Rendering.

title: T001[C]: Game Context (Battle State)
description: src/context/GameContext.tsx. Minimal game state for battle phase: initialize game (Medium terrain, 1 player + 3 AI Veteran, initial wind), track tanks/terrain/wind/turnNumber/projectiles/explosions/winner/phase. Phase transitions: startBattle(), restartBattle(). Turn state: isPlayerTurn, isAnimating. Functions: setPlayerAngle, setPlayerPower, firePlayerShot, advanceTurn. Winner detection. Hardcoded defaults.

title: T002[D]: Keyboard Hook
description: src/hooks/useKeyboard.ts. W/S or Up/Down: angle ±1° (±5° with Shift). A/D or Left/Right: power ±1% (±5° with Shift). Space/Enter: fire. Disabled when !isPlayerTurn or isAnimating. Calls GameContext functions.

title: T003[A]: Canvas Foundation
description: src/components/Canvas.tsx. Sized to terrain dimensions. requestAnimationFrame loop at 60fps. Sky gradient background (dark top, lighter bottom). Terrain rendering as filled polygon from heights array, rebuilt each frame. World-to-screen coordinate conversion. Canvas ref for 2D context.

title: T004[B]: Tank Rendering
description: src/components/Canvas.tsx (extend T003). Tank body: filled rect ~50x16px. Turret: small circle on top. Barrel: line at current angle. Wheels: small circles under body. Name label: white text above. Health bar: thin rect proportional to HP%, green→red. Current-turn indicator: downward arrow. Depends on T003.

title: Phase 2 — Interactivity
description: Cross-track dependencies: Control Panel, Projectile Animation, Explosion Rendering, Turn Resolution Engine.

title: T005[D]: Control Panel
description: src/components/ControlPanel.tsx. Display angle (degrees) with up/down buttons. Display power (%) with up/down buttons. Fire button (disabled when not player turn or animating). Wind speed/direction text. Turn number text. Selected weapon name (Standard Shell). Functional minimal styling. Depends on T001 (GameContext).

title: T006[A]: Projectile Animation
description: src/components/Canvas.tsx (extend). Animate active projectiles as small filled circles (weapon-colored). Draw dotted trail from ProjectileState. Handle multiple simultaneous projectiles (up to 4). Visual speed multiplier 5x. Remove on collision/OOB. Depends on T003 (canvas), T001 (GameContext).

title: T007[B]: Explosion & Destruction Rendering
description: src/components/Canvas.tsx (extend). Explosion: expanding filled circle with radial gradient. Particles: small circles flying outward with gravity, fading. Tank destruction: debris rectangles flying outward ~2s. Crater visible via terrain re-rendering. Depends on T004 (tank rendering), T001 (GameContext).

title: T008[C]: Turn Resolution Engine
description: src/context/GameContext.tsx (extend T001). Full turn loop: Player fires → AI fires (calculateAIShot Veteran) → Create projectiles → Animate (isAnimating=true, updateProjectile per frame) → On collision: calculateDamage, carveCrater, settleTank, createExplosion, death check → Resolution: all done → isAnimating=false → Win check → Advance turn: updateWind, increment turn. Depends on T001, uses Spec 002 engine.

title: Phase 3 — Game Loop Completion
description: App Integration and Integration Testing & Tuning.

title: T009[A]: App Integration
description: src/App.tsx. Wire everything: GameContext provider wrapper, render Canvas + ControlPanel during 'playing' phase, game over overlay with winner name and Play Again button, restartBattle() on replay, auto-start battle on load. Depends on T001, T003, T005, T008.

title: T010[D]: Integration Testing & Tuning
description: Manual + automated verification. Full battle start to finish. Verify: projectile arcs, wind effects, explosions at impact, craters form, tanks settle, AI fires back (Veteran), health bars update, death animation, win/lose detection, restart works. Tune physics constants (POWER_SCALE, gravity, wind factor). Ensure 60fps with 4 projectiles on Medium terrain. All tests/lint/build pass. Depends on T009.

title: Spec 004 — Game Flow & Configuration
description: Full game phase state machine and all non-battle screens. Player name entry, battle config (terrain size, enemy count, difficulty, color), game over screen, full phase routing, LocalStorage persistence. Depends on Spec 003. Can parallel with Specs 005, 006, 007. Spec: specs/004-game-flow-configuration/spec.md

title: Phase 1 — Persistence & State
description: LocalStorage service and User Context for profile persistence. Parallel tracks.

title: T001[A]: LocalStorage Service
description: src/services/storage.ts. saveProfile(profile), loadProfile() with null on missing/corrupt, clearProfile(), getDefaultProfile(name) with 500 credits/zeroed stats/empty inventory. Tests: round-trip, null on no data, null on corrupt JSON, clear, default values.

title: T002[A]: User Context
description: src/context/UserContext.tsx. Depends on T001. React context providing playerName, balance, stats, weaponInventory. Load profile on mount. setPlayerName, updateBalance, updateStats, updateWeaponInventory. Auto-save on every change. hasProfile for routing.

title: T003[C]: Game Context Phase Machine
description: src/context/GameContext.tsx (extend Spec 003). All phases: nameEntry, config, shop, playing, gameOver. goToConfig(), startBattle(config), endGame(winner), playAgain(). Remove hardcoded defaults. Initial phase based on profile existence. Placeholder shop phase auto-advances.

title: Phase 2 — Screen Components
description: Name entry, config, game over screens and app phase router. Depends on Phase 1.

title: T004[B]: Player Name Entry Screen
description: src/components/PlayerNameEntry.tsx. Text input 1-20 chars, validation, disabled Start button when invalid. On submit: setPlayerName() → config phase. Skip if profile exists. Functional styling. Depends on T002 (UserContext).

title: T005[B]: Battle Configuration Screen
description: src/components/GameConfigScreen.tsx. Terrain size selector (5 options with dimensions). Enemy count 1-10. Difficulty selector (5 levels). Color picker (8+ swatches). Start Battle button. Player name greeting. Depends on T003 (GameContext phase machine).

title: T006[B]: Game Over Screen
description: src/components/GameOverScreen.tsx. Winner name, Victory/Defeat display, Play Again → config. Placeholder earnings area. Display player stats. Update stats on mount (gamesPlayed, gamesWon, kills). Depends on T003 (GameContext).

title: T007[C]: App Phase Router
description: src/App.tsx (rewrite). Wrap in UserContext.Provider + GameContext.Provider. Switch on phase: nameEntry→PlayerNameEntry, config→GameConfigScreen, shop→auto-advance, playing→Canvas+ControlPanel, gameOver→GameOverScreen. Handle return visits. Depends on T002, T003, T004, T005, T006.

title: Spec 005 — Design System & Visual Polish
description: Transform the game into Scorched Earth visual style. Dark war-torn atmosphere, military-themed UI, polished explosions, detailed terrain, cohesive visual language. CSS, canvas rendering, design tokens. No game logic changes. Depends on Spec 003. Parallel with 004, 006, 007. Spec: specs/005-design-system/spec.md

title: Phase 1 — Design Foundation
description: Design tokens, sky/terrain upgrade, explosion visual upgrade. Parallel tracks.

title: T001[A]: Design Token System
description: src/styles/theme.ts + src/styles/global.css. Colors (sky, terrain, ui, text, health, status), Typography (heading/body/mono stacks, font sizes), Spacing (4px base), Panel styles (bg, border, radius). Global CSS: body bg, default font, box-sizing, dark scrollbars.

title: T002[B]: Sky & Terrain Visual Upgrade
description: src/components/Canvas.tsx. Sky: vertical gradient #0A0E1A→#1A1A3E, optional subtle stars. Terrain: vertical gradient (grass→fill→dirt), 2-3px grass line, crater areas show darker exposed rock, optional fine-grain noise pattern.

title: T003[C]: Explosion Visual Upgrade
description: src/components/Canvas.tsx. Radial gradient with weapon colors. More particles (20-40), varied sizes, gravity, fade. Screen flash on heavy explosions (50ms, 10% opacity). Smoke aftermath (3-5 gray circles drift/fade 2-3s). Tank destruction debris upgrade.

title: Phase 2 — UI & Tank Polish
description: Screen styling, tank visual refinement, control panel styling. Depends on design tokens.

title: T004[A]: Screen Styling
description: Apply design system to all non-battle screens. All screens: dark bg, centered card, panel styling. PlayerNameEntry: military stencil heading, dark input, amber focus, START button. GameConfigScreen: uppercase section headings, button groups with accent, color swatches, START BATTLE button. GameOverScreen: large winner name, Victory/Defeat colors, stats grid, FIGHT AGAIN button. Depends on T001.

title: T005[B]: Tank Visual Refinement
description: src/components/Canvas.tsx. Trapezoidal body with angled front plate. Treads: dark rectangles under body. Turret: filled circle on top. Barrel: rectangle with shadow. Name label: small caps. Health bar: 3px, gradient green→red. Turn indicator: accent triangle with pulse animation.

title: T006[C]: Control Panel Styling
description: src/components/ControlPanel.tsx + CSS. Fixed bottom full-width panel. Monospace readouts for ANGLE and POWER with dim uppercase labels. Styled adjustment buttons (▲▼◄►). Fire button: large #CC4400, FIRE uppercase, disabled dimmed, enabled pulse glow. Wind display with directional arrow colored by intensity. Turn display monospace.

title: Phase 3 — Transitions & Final Polish
description: Screen transitions and visual consistency pass.

title: T007[A]: Screen Transitions
description: src/App.tsx + CSS. Fade-out/fade-in between screens (300ms). Battle start: brief BATTLE STATIONS text flash (1s). Game over: canvas dims with dark overlay. Keep transitions ≤500ms total.

title: T008[C]: Visual Polish Pass
description: All canvas rendering. Canvas text uses design system fonts. All colors reference theme constants (no hardcoded hex). Projectile trail: fading circles. Sky gradient correct at all sizes. Terrain gradient correct with varied heights. Tank colors contrast against terrain. Health bars readable small. Explosions look good everywhere. Craters visually distinct.

title: Spec 006 — Weapons & Economy
description: Three-weapon system and full credit economy. Weapon shop, in-battle weapon selector, distinct weapon behaviors (sniper instant-kill, heavy blast radius, standard fallback), credit earnings based on performance. Balance persists across sessions. Depends on Spec 003. Parallel with 004, 005, 007. Spec: specs/006-weapons-economy/spec.md

title: Phase 1 — Weapon Foundation
description: Weapon selection panel, weapon shop screen, economy engine. Parallel tracks.

title: T001[B]: Weapon Selection Panel
description: src/components/WeaponSelectionPanel.tsx. Display 3 weapons with names/ammo (∞ for standard). Highlight selected. Gray out 0-ammo weapons. Click to select. Standard always available. Read inventory from game state, write selected weapon to GameContext.

title: T002[A]: Weapon Shop Screen
description: src/components/WeaponShop.tsx. Display before battle (shop phase). 3 weapons with stats/descriptions. Buy button (disabled when balance < cost). Purchase: deduct cost, increment ammo. Balance displayed. Ready for Battle button. Current ammo counts. Multiple purchases allowed. Tests: balance deduction, ammo increment, disabled on insufficient funds, skip.

title: T003[C]: Economy Engine
description: src/context/GameContext.tsx + UserContext.tsx. Track kills per game. On game end: killEarnings = kills × 200 × difficultyMultiplier, winBonus = 250 × mult (or loss consolation = 50 × mult). Difficulty multipliers: BlindFool 0.5, Private 0.75, Veteran 1.0, Centurion 1.25, Primus 1.5. Update balance, store earnings breakdown. Tests: per-difficulty math, accumulation, persistence.

title: Phase 2 — Integration
description: Weapon firing integration, shop phase wiring, game over earnings display.

title: T004[B]: Weapon Firing Integration
description: src/context/GameContext.tsx (extend turn resolution). Player shot includes selected weaponType. Projectile speed modified by weapon speedMultiplier (sniper 1.3x, heavy 0.8x). Non-standard weapons decrement ammo on fire. Auto-switch to standard when empty. Damage uses weapon's damage%/blastRadius. Weapon-specific explosion colors and crater sizes. Depends on T001. Tests: per-weapon stats, ammo decrement, auto-switch.

title: T005[A]: Shop Phase Integration
description: src/App.tsx + GameContext.tsx. After config → shop phase → render WeaponShop. Shop reads balance/inventory from UserContext. Ready for Battle → transfer inventory to GameContext, transition to playing. On game over → calculate earnings, update balance, show in GameOverScreen. Depends on T002, T003.

title: T006[C]: Game Over Earnings Display
description: src/components/GameOverScreen.tsx (extend). Show kills count, kill earnings with math, win/loss bonus, difficulty multiplier, total earned, new balance, previous balance comparison. Depends on T003.

title: Phase 3 — Polish & Testing
description: Weapon visual differentiation and integration testing.

title: T007[B]: Weapon Visual Differentiation
description: src/components/Canvas.tsx. Standard: small orange circle, moderate speed. Sniper: small white/blue, faster, thinner trail. Heavy: larger dark red, slower, thicker trail. Explosion colors per weapon config. Crater sizes visibly different. Depends on T004.

title: T008[C]: Integration Testing
description: End-to-end weapon + economy flow. Start 500 credits → buy 2 snipers → balance 100 → heavy disabled → enter battle → weapon selector shows ammo → fire sniper (fast, small blast, instant kill) → ammo decrements → empty grayed out → fire standard → win → earnings breakdown → balance persists across games and refresh. Depends on T005, T006, T007.

title: Spec 007 — Advanced AI & Difficulty Tiers
description: Five distinct AI difficulty tiers with perceptible behavioral differences. Blind Fool to Primus. Wind-aware ideal shot calculation, intelligent target selection with persistence, calibrated accuracy spread. Depends on Spec 003. Parallel with 004, 005, 006. Spec: specs/007-advanced-ai-difficulty/spec.md

title: Phase 1 — AI Engine Upgrade
description: Difficulty-calibrated shot calculation, target selection with persistence, expanded AI name pool. Parallel tracks.

title: T001[A]: Difficulty-Calibrated Shot Calculation
description: src/engine/ai.ts + ai.test.ts. Ideal shot calculation accounting for distance, height diff, wind, gravity. 5-tier variance: Blind Fool ±30°/±40, Private ±15°/±25, Veteran ±8°/±15, Centurion ±4°/±8, Primus ±2°/±4. Uniform random variance. Clamp angle ±120°, power 0-100%. Tests: ideal shot hits within 5px, wind compensation, height diff, difficulty ordering, clamping.

title: T002[A]: Target Selection with Persistence
description: src/engine/ai.ts + ai.test.ts. selectTarget(shooter, aliveTanks, lastTargetId). Persist targeting (same tank across turns). Prefer nearest enemy on new selection. Never self-target. Store lastTargetId per AI tank. Tests: persistence, new target on death, null first turn, no self-target, null on no targets, nearest preference.

title: T003[B]: AI Name Pool
description: src/engine/tank.ts (extend). Expand to 30+ military callsign names. Shuffle and assign without duplicates per game. Names display well in tank labels. Tests: no duplicates with 10 AI, names from pool, pool has 30+ entries.

title: Phase 2 — Integration & Calibration
description: AI integration into game context and difficulty calibration testing.

title: T004[A]: AI Integration into Game Context
description: src/context/GameContext.tsx (extend). Pass game difficulty level to calculateAIShot(). Store/pass lastTargetId per AI tank between turns. Update lastTargetId after target selection each turn. Auto-select new target on death. Depends on T001, T002.

title: T005[B]: Difficulty Calibration & Testing
description: Automated: simulate 50 turns at each difficulty, measure hit rates. Expected: Blind Fool <10%, Private ~15-25%, Veteran ~35-50%, Centurion ~55-70%, Primus ~80-95%. Strictly monotonic ordering. Manual: 1v1 at each difficulty to verify feel. Verify target persistence and switching. Depends on T004.

title: Spec 008 — Viewport, Movement & Final Integration
description: Final spec. Canvas viewport for large terrains, tank movement with fuel, wind/turn indicators, wind particles, edge cases, performance optimization, comprehensive integration test. After this, the game is complete. Depends on Specs 004, 005, 006, 007. Spec: specs/008-viewport-movement-integration/spec.md

title: Phase 1 — Core Features
description: Viewport system, tank movement, wind/turn indicators, wind particles. Parallel tracks.

title: T001[A]: Canvas Viewport System
description: src/components/Canvas.tsx (major extension). Viewport camera (viewportX, viewportY). Rendering offset (-viewportX, -viewportY). Auto-center on player at turn start with lerp (~500ms). Clamp to terrain bounds. Small terrains centered with no scroll. Optional mouse/keyboard panning. Tests: clamping, auto-center, small terrain, rendering offset, lerp smoothness.

title: T002[B]: Tank Movement System
description: src/context/GameContext.tsx + Canvas.tsx. Fuel system scaling by terrain size (Small:100, Medium:150, Large:200, Huge:250, Epic:350). Q/E keys move ±5px along terrain surface, 1 fuel/px. Y follows terrain height. Boundary check (0 to terrainWidth). Fuel display in control panel. Movement only during player turn, not animating. Smooth visual slide. Tests: fuel decrement, terrain following, boundaries, fuel exhaustion, disabled during animation, terrain-size scaling, AI doesn't move.

title: T003[B]: Wind & Turn Indicators
description: src/components/WindIndicator.tsx + TurnIndicator.tsx. Wind: numeric speed (1 decimal), directional arrow, intensity-based arrow size/color (0-5 subtle, 5-15 moderate, 15-30 strong/warning). Fixed top of viewport. Turn: turn number, YOUR TURN / FIRING... labels. Design system styled. Both fixed position (don't scroll).

title: T004[C]: Wind Particle Effects
description: src/components/Canvas.tsx (extend). ~20-30 semi-transparent particles flowing horizontally matching wind direction. Speed proportional to wind strength. Randomly distributed vertically. Wrap around screen edges. Very subtle, non-distracting. Rendered above sky, below terrain/tanks.

title: Phase 2 — Edge Cases & Polish
description: Edge case handling and performance optimization.

title: T005[C]: Edge Case Handling
description: src/context/GameContext.tsx. 10 edge cases: (1) Simultaneous death → player favored, (2) All AI killed in single volley → immediate win, (3) Multi-tank blast damage, (4) Tank at terrain edge, (5) Zero-credit shop, (6) Maximum wind 30m/s, (7) Tank in valley (AI still attempts), (8) Terrain cratered beneath tank → settleTank, (9) Multiple overlapping craters, (10) Win with 0 kills. Tests for each. Depends on all Phase 1.

title: T006[A]: Performance Optimization
description: src/components/Canvas.tsx. 60fps with Epic terrain + 10 AI + 11 projectiles + explosions + wind particles. Cull off-screen objects. Limit trail length (~100 points). Limit particles per explosion. Integer coordinates for pixel ops. requestAnimationFrame timing. Depends on T001 (viewport).

title: Phase 3 — Final Integration
description: Comprehensive integration testing across all features.

title: T007[C]: Comprehensive Integration Test
description: Full game through every feature and edge case. Automated: vitest + eslint + tsc all clean, >80% engine coverage. Manual: 5 consecutive games covering (1) Basic flow Veteran/3/Medium, (2) Economy check with weapon purchases, (3) Difficulty spread Blind Fool vs Primus, (4) Large terrain Epic/10 enemies with viewport/performance, (5) Edge cases + movement + fuel + indicators + persistence. Game declared COMPLETE after pass. Depends on all Phase 2.
